issue.title: Should there be a feature-test macro update for constexpr `std::to_(w)string`?

discussion.p:
added `constexpr` to integral overloads of `std::to_string` and `std::to_wstring`. However, the paper only added one feature-test macro `__cpp_lib_constexpr_format`, which doesn't seem clearly related to `std::to_(w)string`.
Given that contained the constexpr additions in which proposed to bump `__cpp_lib_to_string`, perhaps we should bump that FTM. It might be also reasonable to bump `__cpp_lib_constexpr_string` for pure constexpr additions.

blockquote.p: [Drafting Note: Two mutually exclusive options are prepared, depicted below by Option A and Option B, respectively.]
